name: otzaria-plugin
description: A plugin for the Otzaria application

scripts.build: npm run sync:version && npm run build:ts && npm run copy:libs
scripts.copy:libs: npm run copy:material && npm run copy:fonts
scripts.copy:material: mkdir -p src/lib/material && cp node_modules/material-components-web/dist/material-components-web.min.css src/lib/material/ && cp node_modules/material-components-web/dist/material-components-web.min.js src/lib/material/
scripts.copy:fonts: mkdir -p src/lib/fonts && cp -r node_modules/@fontsource/roboto/files src/lib/fonts/roboto && cp -r node_modules/material-icons/iconfont src/lib/fonts/material-icons
